Member-only story

Understand the difference between a map and a set with simple examples

3 min read
3 hours ago

--

Image from Meta AIFree member? Read here —
Have you got confused between Map and Set?
Both help you store data, but they solve different problems.
Let’s make it simple.
Map
A map is a data structure that stores data in key-value pairs.
You can think of it like a contact list:

• Name — Phone Number

• Product — Price

• User ID — User Details
Example:
const users = new Map(); users.set("John", 25);
users.set("Nick", 30);
console.log(users.get("John"));
console.log(users.get("Nick"));
Output:
25
30I have run directly in the browser console, and this is how the whole code with output looks:
